data.title: Uniswap Achieves Record Quarterly Trading Volume in 2024
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from Token Terminal reveals that Uniswap's trading volume reached an all-time high in the fourth quarter of 2024, totaling $235.9 billion. This milestone highlights the platform's growing influence in the decentralized finance sector.

data.title: Kazakhstan Proposes Crypto Bank: New Regulation
data.description:
A Kazakh MP proposes the creation of a national cryptobank to regulate and integrate cryptocurrencies into the country's economy.
source: https://en.spaziocrypto.com/regulation/kazakhstan-proposes-crypto-bank-new-regulation/

data.title: Will the Nintendo Switch 2 Be Too Big?
data.description:
Before Nintendo spills all the beans on its launch plans, there's growing concern that bigger won't actually be better with the Switch 2.
source: https://decrypt.co/312244/nintendo-switch-2-too-big

data.title: A whale transferred 4.49 million MOVE from Coinbase Prime 5 hours ago, equivalent to about 2.11 million US dollars
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, 5 hours ago, a whale withdrew 4.49 million MOVE from Coinbase Prime, worth $2.11 million. So far, the whale has hoarded 5.16 million MOVE, worth $2.41 million.

data.title: Panama proposes new regulation for crypto and blockchain development
data.description:
Panama has published a new crypto draft bill that aims to regulate digital assets while fostering blockchain technology development in the country. The new bill was released in line with efforts to establish the country as a leader in the blockchain industry. Before now, the legal status of digital assets in Panama had been something […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/panama-proposes-regulation-crypto/

data.title: Ethereum’s price struggles – Will President Trump’s vote of confidence be key?
data.description:
While Ethereum flays about with struggles piling up, the President is confident.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/ethereums-price-struggles-will-president-trumps-vote-of-confidence-be-key/

data.title: Gold-backed cryptocurrencies are unaffected by the market drop, with PAXG and XAUT both rising
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The cryptocurrency market fell today, perhaps because investors were worried about macro policy changes in April and reduced their exposure to risky assets. The liquidation scale in the past 24 hours has exceeded 300 million US dollars, and BTC has fallen to the 82,000 US dollar range. However, gold-backed cryptocurrencies are reversing the bearish trend of the market. PAXG has risen 0.7% in the past 24 hours, and XAUT has risen about 1%. (Coindesk)

data.title: Bitcoin adoption in EU limited by ‘fragmented’ regulations — Analysts
data.description:
Institutional adoption of Bitcoin in the European Union remains sluggish, even as the United States moves forward with landmark cryptocurrency regulations that seek to establish BTC as a national reserve asset. More than three weeks after President Donald Trump’s March 7 executive order outlined plans to use cryptocurrency seized in criminal cases to create a federal Bitcoin (BTC) reserve, European companies have largely remained silent on the issue. The stagnation may stem from Europe’s complex regulatory regime, according to Elisenda Fabrega, general counsel at Brickken, a European real-world asset (RWA) tokenization platform. “European corporate adoption remains limited,” Fabrega told Cointelegraph, adding:“This hesitation reflects a deeper structural divide, rooted in regulation, institutional signaling and market maturity
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-adoption-eu-fragmented-regulations-analysts?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Thailand’s SEC files criminal complaint against OKX for operating without a license
data.description:
Thailand Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has filed a complaint against popular crypto exchange OKX for operating in the country without a license. The criminal complaint was against OKX operator Aux Cayes FinTech Co. Ltd and nine exchange associates. In the complaint filed with the Economic Crime Suppression Division (ECD), the SEC claimed that OKX […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/thailand-criminal-complaints-against-okx/
